title: This is not profession-toned enough and also needs to be brushed up and made more concise and more sophisticated:

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
This is not profession-toned enough and also needs to be brushed up and made more concise and more sophisticated: 
HBL Bangladesh Appoints Parul Das as CFO

Dhaka, Bangladesh, June 11, 2023: HBL, a bank of regional relevance with operations spread across multiple geographies, has newly appointed Parul Das as its Chief Financial Officer (CFO) for Bangladesh. With 23 years of diverse experience, Parul will contribute to HBL's presence in the Bangladesh market and drive regional and international growth.
Parul Das has held positions at prominent organizations including Bangladesh Bank, City Bank, BRAC Bank, ONE Bank, BD Finance, Hoda Vasi Chowdhury & Co. Chartered Accountants, and KPMG Bangladesh. She brings expertise in financial operations, business finance, capital management, project management, and operational functions. Previously, she has served as CFO at ONE Bank.
Selim Barkat, Country Head of HBL Bangladesh, stated, "Our newly appointed CFO, Parul Das, with her extensive experience in finance and industry knowledge, is well-equipped to drive HBL's growth strategy and elevate our market standing."
In response, Parul Das stated, "As CFO of HBL Bangladesh, I am presented with a significant opportunity to contribute to the bank's growth and development. I look forward to generate value-added solutions and strengthen HBL's local and international network.”
Parul Das is a graduate of the University of Chittagong and holds the esteemed designation of Fellow Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Bangladesh (ICAB) as well as Associate Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of England & Wales (ICAEW). Her expertise will play a pivotal role in expanding HBL's business operations both locally and internationally.
With Parul Das as CFO, HBL aims to provide innovative and customer-centric banking services, solidifying its position in Bangladesh's financial landscape.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
HBL Bank Appoints Parul Das as Chief Financial Officer in Bangladesh

Dhaka, Bangladesh, June 11, 2023: Regional banking institution HBL is pleased to announce the appointment of Parul Das as Chief Financial Officer (CFO) for its operations in Bangladesh. With over 23 years of diverse experience in the financial sector, Ms. Das will play a crucial role in expanding HBL's presence in the Bangladesh market and driving regional and international growth.

Throughout her career, Ms. Das has held prominent positions in a series of esteemed organizations, including Bangladesh Bank, City Bank, BRAC Bank, ONE Bank, BD Finance, Hoda Vasi Chowdhury & Co. Chartered Accountants, and KPMG Bangladesh. Her comprehensive expertise encompasses financial operations, business finance, capital management, project management, and operational functions. Most recently, she served as the CFO at ONE Bank.

In a statement, Selim Barkat, Country Head of HBL Bangladesh, said, "We are delighted to welcome Parul Das as our new CFO. Her extensive experience in finance and industry knowledge make her ideally suited to drive HBL's growth strategy and enhance our market presence."

Ms. Das added, "I am honored to take on the role of CFO at HBL Bangladesh and recognize the significant opportunity to contribute to the bank's growth and development. I am eager to deliver value-added solutions and strengthen HBL's local and international network."

A graduate of the University of Chittagong, Ms. Das also holds the prestigious Fellow Member designation from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Bangladesh (ICAB) and is an Associate Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of England & Wales (ICAEW). Her extensive expertise is set to play a pivotal role in expanding HBL's business operations both locally and internationally.

With the appointment of Parul Das, HBL reaffirms its commitment to delivering innovative, customer-focused banking services and solidifying its position in Bangladesh's financial landscape.
